meaning: n.结合物,联合体,社团,小型爵士乐团
examples: If all partitions are in a combo state where they are both sending and receiving data, then statistics cannot be collected.
If you never record DVDs, you can save money by buying a cheaper combo drive, which plays both DVDs and CDs but records only the latter.
I'll have the steak and chicken combo platter.
The Vytorin combo is better at lowering cholesterol than either Zetia or Zocor alone.
In 1997 it hit the jackpot with an adjuvant combo that protected six of seven volunteers.
